hooks.command: powershell -Command "$files = @('.agent/CONTEXT.md','.agent/PROGRESS.md','.agent/HANDOFF.md','.agent/LESSONS.md','.agent/DECISIONS.md'); $missing = $files | Where-Object { !(Test-Path $_) }; if ($missing) { Write-Error ('GUARD 1 FAILED: Missing files: ' + ($missing -join ', ')); exit 2 }"

powershell -Command "$cmd = $env:CLAUDE_BASH_COMMAND; $blocked = @('rm -rf','git reset --hard','git clean -fd','DROP TABLE','DROP DATABASE','terraform apply','del /f /s /q'); foreach ($b in $blocked) { if ($cmd -match [regex]::Escape($b)) { Write-Error ('BLOCKED: Destructive command detected — ' + $b); exit 2 } }"
powershell -Command "$date = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm'; Add-Content -Path '.agent/sessions/$(Get-Date -Format yyyy-MM-dd).md' -Value ('## Session end: ' + $date)"
